privacy.emptyContent: No content yet. Admins can edit this page at /admin/pages
privacy.section1Body: We collect data necessary to provide the service, such as email, agency name, and download logs with the purpose you specify.
privacy.section2Body: Data is used to provide search, download, and dataset management services, and to comply with applicable laws.
privacy.section3Body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete personal data under the Personal Data Protection Act.
privacy.section4Body: If you have questions about this policy, please contact the system administrator through the channels listed on this site.
